{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320160331D69B4DF2067188E7A9BF"}"},"total":2416},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7256408105508324111","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"不错的军旅题材，应该是我看的最接近军旅生涯的模式，有血有肉，故事情节衔接严谨，曲折离奇，人物形象突出，内心独白个性鲜明…"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1689514268,"group_id":"6629610616560552974","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喜欢运动，游泳、跑步、骑行、户外运动、登山看武侠小说，交友！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5mm3n0O9gu9SYsLAUMGv5GZeB9f8t0ebqRmR1KhYHT9","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4208551235169548","user_name":"乌诺星域的海帆"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4208551235169548","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6629610616560552974","book_info":{"abstract":"“狼牙少帅”刘猛最受赞誉作品，无数军迷心中难以跨越的经典！《狼牙》是以第一支陆军特种部队的创建及成长作为背景，描写了从南疆保卫战之后至今的漫长历史事件，揭开了特种部队的神秘面纱。小说以大跨度、大场面、全景式的描述将第一支陆军特种部队从出生到享誉世界的铁血成长历程完整地呈现在了读者面前。
《狼牙》中人物棱角鲜明，以“狼牙特种大队”的创建为主线，讲述了军长刘勇军、大队长何志军、政委耿辉等职业军人鲜为人知的故事，刻画了刘晓飞、张雷、林锐等新青年士兵激情澎湃的热血传奇，同时，还描写了何小雨、刘芳芳、方子君等百合一样军中之花的爱恨情愁。"","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/8ab89caeb0f7cd15e3b721739102489a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"刘猛 著","author_id":"","book_id":"6629610616560552974","book_name":"狼牙","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203050","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"255.9万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":973,"name":"战争军旅","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=973&name=战争军旅&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6629741718784705028","read_count":"23552","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"442854"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.7","serial_count":"340","tags":"精品小说,战争军旅","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/8ab89caeb0f7cd15e3b721739102489a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779177811&x-signature=rfZNglfavZyFWraZ3igw%2FzLkq4I%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.1929042e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320160331D69B4DF2067188E7A9BF"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读18小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":16,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":42659,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":64588,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":8665},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7448102471842956056","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是一部写给中国军人的小说，不管她是不是真实的故事和人物，我都为我们最可爱的人感动的落泪了，我也当过兵，作者写的太贴近部队生活了，真是“哪有岁月静好，只有我们最可爱的军人在默默无闻为人民守护者”。感谢作者[赞][赞][赞]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1734152922,"group_id":"6629610616560552974","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7n6wC
